# Release Checklist

## Version 1.0 Portfolio Release

- [ ] Confirm branch is based on the intended latest phase branch.
- [ ] Run `npm run format`.
- [ ] Run `npm run typecheck`.
- [ ] Run `npm run lint`.
- [ ] Run `npm test`.
- [ ] Run `npm run build`.
- [ ] Run backend tests if backend changed.
- [ ] Confirm `/showcase` renders.
- [ ] Confirm `/about` renders.
- [ ] Confirm README links are correct.
- [ ] Confirm screenshots are captured or marked as placeholders.
- [ ] Confirm no secrets are committed.
- [ ] Confirm release notes and changelog are updated.
